dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The 'rules-context-loader' step successfully validated its output against the schema, ensuring that governance constraints were correctly ingested. The high prompt-to-completion token ratio suggests a comprehensive processing of the rule set.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The trace demonstrates a logical progression from rule ingestion to architectural mapping. The 'vision-to-aw' step generated 3,925 tokens of reasoning, indicating a deep derivation of the architecture from the provided vision and rules.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The successful schema validation of the final 'vision-to-aw' output, despite the complexity of the input vision (7,640 prompt tokens), suggests that the agent effectively resolved architectural tensions into a valid, structured implementation plan.
